ayahEnglish: Taught the Qur’ān,
Created man,

targetTranslation: he taught him (object of the teaching in الْبَيَانَ - clear speech)
ayahEnglish: [And] taught him eloquence.

targetTranslation: they both prostrate (referring to النَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ - the star and tree)
ayahEnglish: And the stars and trees prostrate.

targetTranslation: he raised it (referring to السَّمَآءَ/the sky)
ayahEnglish: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance

targetTranslation: you all cross limits (don't cross limits in ٱلْمِيزَانِ)
ayahEnglish: That you not transgress within the balance.

ayahArabic: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
ayahEnglish: And establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance.

targetTranslation: he placed it/her (referring to الْأَرْضَ, the earth)
ayahEnglish: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.
Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
And grain having husks and scented plants.

targetTranslation: of the favors (possessed by رَبِّكُمَا - your Lord)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: you two deny intensely (referring to humans and jinn in this ayah)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: he created (subject of the sentence, followed by ٱلْإِنسٰنَ - mankind)
ayahEnglish: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.

targetTranslation: of dry clay that makes a ringing sound (describing الْإِنسٰنَ/mankind)
ayahEnglish: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.

ayahArabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
ayahEnglish: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.

ayahArabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
ayahEnglish: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: you two strongly deny (referring to humans and jinn in this ayah)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: The Lord (of الْمَشْرِقَيْنِ - the two Easts)
ayahEnglish: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.

So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: you both deny (referring to humans and jinn in this ayah)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: He released/let flow (referring to the two seas يَلْتَقِيَانِ that meet)
ayahEnglish: He released the two seas, meeting [one another];

targetTranslation: they both meet with each other (referring to ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ - the two seas)
ayahEnglish: He released the two seas, meeting [one another];

targetTranslation: between them both (referring to the two bodies of water mentioned earlier)
ayahEnglish: Between them is a barrier so neither of them transgresses.
Between them is a barrier so neither of them transgresses.

targetTranslation: they both transgress (referring to the two seas)
ayahEnglish: Between them is a barrier so neither of them transgresses.
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: you two deny intensely/repeatedly (addressing both humans and jinn)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
From both of them emerge pearl and coral.

targetTranslation: blessings, favors (belonging to رَبِّكُمَا - your Lord)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: you two are denying (referring to humans and jinn in this ayah)

So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: you both strongly deny/reject (referring to humans and jinn being addressed in this surah)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahEnglish: Everyone upon it [i.e., the earth] will perish,
Everyone upon it [i.e., the earth] will perish,
Everyone upon it [i.e., the earth] will perish,

ayahArabic: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
ayahEnglish: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.

ayahArabic: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
ayahEnglish: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.

targetTranslation: he asks him (subject of asks من 'whoever')
ayahArabic: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ
ayahEnglish: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is in [i.e., bringing about] a matter.

ayahArabic: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ

ayahEnglish: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is in [i.e., bringing about] a matter.

We will attend to you, O prominent beings.

targetTranslation: favors, blessings (possessed by رَبِّكُمَا - your Lord)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

targetTranslation: you both deny intensely (addressing both Allah's creations mentioned in this surah)
ayahEnglish: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahArabic: يٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطٰنٍ
ayahEnglish: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allāh].

ayahArabic: يٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطٰنٍ
ayahEnglish: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allāh].

ayahArabic: يٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطٰنٍ
ayahEnglish: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allāh].

ayahArabic: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
ayahEnglish: There will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke, and you will not defend yourselves.

targetTranslation: a smokeless flame (subject of يُرْسَلُ - is sent)

ayahEnglish: And when the heaven is split open and becomes rose-colored like oil -

ayahArabic: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَٱلدِّهَانِ

ayahArabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
ayahEnglish: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.

ayahArabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ

ayahEnglish: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.

ayahEnglish: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.

ayahArabic: هٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ

targetTranslation: those who are reclining (describes the people of Paradise)
ayahArabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
ayahEnglish: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.

targetTranslation: He is supremely blessed/exalted (referring to اللَّهِ)
ayahArabic: تَبٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
ayahEnglish: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
